name: Passkeys.dev
description: Passkeys.dev — W3C/FIDO community resource and implementation guides for WebAuthn passkey integration across platforms.

seo.title: Passkeys.dev — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Passkeys.dev: Passkeys.dev — W3C/FIDO community resource and implementation guides for WebAuthn passkey integration across platforms.

when_to_use: WebAuthn implementation guide for FIDO2 passkey integration
Cross-platform passkey support reference for iOS, Android, web
CTAP2 device support lookup for hardware security key usage
Autofill UI patterns for passkey-first authentication UX

pros: Authoritative community guides for WebAuthn passkeys
Vendor-neutral reference maintained by FIDO/W3C people
cons: Documentation site, not a product or service
No SDK, hosting or user management included
Requires you to glue libraries together yourself
Content assumes solid auth engineering background
review.verdict: Essential reading before you implement passkeys, but you still need a real auth stack on top.
review.best_for: Engineers learning how to implement WebAuthn correctly
review.not_for: Teams looking for a turnkey passkey SaaS

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
